zh: 那个礼貌的请求是什么?

text: If you park your car in the wrong place,
zh: 如果你把车停错了地方,

text: a traffic policeman will soon find it.
You will be very lucky if he lets you go without a ticket.
zh: 如果他放你一马,不给你开罚单,你就算走运了。

text: However, this does not always happen.
zh: 然而,事情并不总是这样。

text: Traffic police are sometimes very polite.
zh: 交警有时候是很有礼貌的。

text: I found this note on my car:
zh: 我发现车上有一张字条:

text: 'sir, we welcome you to our city. This is a No Parking area.
zh: '先生,欢迎您来到我们的城市。这里是禁止停车区域。

text: You will enjoy your stay here if you pay attention to our street signs. This note is only a reminder.'
zh: 如果您留意我们的路标,一定会在这里玩得愉快。这张字条只是善意的提醒。'

text: If you receive a request like this, you cannot fail to obey it!
zh: 如果你收到这样的请求,你不可能不遵守!
